phase.name: Local MVP
phase.task: Create sample CSVs with realistic mock records.
Add capture log and CSV export.
phase.acceptance_criteria: App runs locally from sample data and supports all six core dashboards plus capture log.

phase.name: Automated Ingestion
phase.acceptance_criteria: Data can be refreshed locally without dashboard API calls.

phase.name: Recompete and Partner Analytics
phase.task: Add score explanations and recommended next action.
phase.acceptance_criteria: User can produce prioritized agency, opportunity, prime, and recompete target lists.

phase.name: Advanced Intelligence
phase.task: Add better entity resolution for vendor names.

definition_of_done.item: README explains setup, sample data, API key safety, refresh workflow, and roadmap.
Tests or validation checks confirm expected columns exist.
Repo is safe to publish without secrets or raw data.
